raw.subject: Your Creve Coeur page caught my eye
raw.body:
Hi,

I've been a fan of your Creve Coeur community for a while, and I always appreciate the love and care that shines through in your pet grooming work. I especially loved the post about a theme this week – it's great to see the joy you bring to your furry friends and their owners.

But I noticed you don't have your own website yet, and I think it could make a big difference for attracting more clients and keeping your business visible in the area. Having a website would allow you to showcase your services, share photos and testimonials, and make it easy for people to book appointments.

I sketched up a homepage idea that incorporates your Facebook photos and posts, highlighting your professional pet care services and making it easy for clients to book grooming appointments. The page features a photo gallery and a clear call-to-action to book your services.

https://sites.damianbasilio.dev/preview/attitudes-with-tails-grooming-salon-creve-coeur

If you're interested in learning more about how to get your website up and running, I'd be happy to discuss the details with you. We can even start with a flat fee for local businesses, making it easy to get started without breaking the bank. Feel free to reply or give me a quick call to explore further.
